creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm going to commit the patch with the following changes:

* Reworded some RAMT_DESC, STAT_DESC, RTREEG_DESC with better English.
* Removed RAMTABLE_DESC, which was not being used.
* Removed the commented out post-install target.
* Finished the staging support by removing MAN1 (which is obsolete with
  staging) and adding man/man1/sqlite3.1.gz to PLIST_FILES.
